title: CLI surface baseline and delta
objective: Create a current-state matrix before runtime implementation so v46 only changes missing or partial behavior.
description: Audits approved criteria against the repository state and assigns every gap to a concrete slice.
parallel_safe_reason: The baseline controls scope for all later v46 implementation slices.
must: Create a baseline/delta matrix with status values present, partial, missing, or regression-risk.
Attach evidence paths for each criterion.
Assign every non-present criterion to a v46 slice.
acceptance: Baseline matrix exists in the v46 spec package.
Every approved v46 criterion is classified.
Every gap has an owning slice.
Matrix distinguishes already implemented behavior from missing work.
validation_hints: Use existing tests as evidence where possible.
Do not trust CLI_ANALYSIS.md if repo evidence contradicts it.
